command.text: if exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_compact_mode' and val = '1') select '1' as view_index else select '0' as view_index

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'Customer', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int, @checkTaxCode int, @taxCodeConflict nvarchar(512) select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell &Customer.Nested.Message.v;.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is &Customer.Nested.Message.e;.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @taxCodeConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'&s1; đã có trong danh mục.' else '&s2; is already exists.' end -- Check create index i on @@table (ma_kh) if @type = '0' delete @@table where ma_kh in (select ma_kh from dmkh) select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; &CheckValidEmailCommandCheckingImport; -- Checking &Checking; -- Check Tax Code -- + Self select @checkTaxCode = case when exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_kt_mst_trung' and val = '2') then 1 else 0 end if @checkTaxCode = 1 begin select @r = stt from (select min(stt) as stt from @@table where ma_so_thue <> '' group by ma_so_thue having count(*) > 1) a if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@taxCodeConflict, '%s1', ma_so_thue), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end end &CommandCheckTaxCodeImport; select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh -- Do not delete following line -- #OverwriteChecking if @type = '1' delete @@table where ma_kh in (select ma_kh from #k) if @checkTaxCode = 1 begin -- + Inserting select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a join dmkh b on a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue left join #k c on b.ma_kh = c.ma_kh where a.ma_so_thue <> '' and c.ma_kh is null group by a.ma_kh if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@taxCodeConflict, '%s1', ma_so_thue), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r return end -- + Updating if @type = '1' begin select @r = min(a.stt) from #k a join dmkh b on a.ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue where a.ma_so_thue <> '' and a.ma_kh <> b.ma_kh group by a.ma_kh if @r is not null begin select replace(replace(@taxCodeConflict, '%s1', ma_so_thue), '%s2', @@delta + @r) as message from #k where stt = @r return end end end -- select @field = 'ma_kh' &Customer.Nested.Key.b; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_kh <> b.ma_kh and a.ma_kh like rtrim(b.ma_kh) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a with (index(i)), dmkh b with (index(PK_dmkh)) where a.ma_kh like rtrim(b.ma_kh) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmkh a with (index(PK_dmkh)), @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_kh like rtrim(b.ma_kh) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; end -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
